title: Sagraea penninervis
taxonomy: Sagraea penninervis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the tribe Spermaeae and is native to South America. The species is characterized by its distinctive leaf morphology and small, fragrant flowers. Sagraea penninervis is closely related to other species within the genus Sagraea, which is distributed across the tropical regions of the Americas. Further classification of Sagraea penninervis is ongoing, with ongoing research into its relationships with other species within the Rubiaceae family.
